idx_hub_missing_photo_pending.name: idx_hub_missing_photo_pending

idx_missing_photo_pending.name: idx_missing_photo_pending

idx_reports_photo_pending.name: idx_reports_photo_pending
idx_reports_photo_pending.where: photo_migrated_at IS NULL AND photo IS NOT NULL
